summary: Iteration 9 — Tested ONLY the NEW features requested: Automations (auto-confirm + routing), Email send via Resend (confirmation+clarification), manual assignment, Scansione channel, and inline product creation from OrderReview. All backend flows (8/8 pytest) and all frontend flows (5/5) pass. Automations restored to defaults on the demo tenant.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — a decorator <span> is being injected into <option> elements of routing-user-select. Functional but noisy in console; the <option> renders in AutomationSetup.js line ~148 wrapping `{m.name}`. Consider inlining plain text or fixing the injected span so React doesn't warn.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1801 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold called out in code review guidelines; should be modularised (orders, automations, email, team, dashboard). Not blocking iteration 9.

OrderReview.js has grown to 478 lines and mixes list rendering, DnD, product-create, email dialog, assignee, export menu; a small refactor (extract EmailDialog, ExportMenu, AssigneeSelect) would help maintainability.
Non-issue but worth noting: /api/auth/login returns `access_token` (not `token`), and the frontend correctly stores it — tests need to read `access_token`. Consistent with backend.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5: Scansione channel, Automations page toggles+routing+save, Order assignee save, Email send confirmation+clarification, Inline product create)

test_credentials: Pilot auto-login demo@ordia.app / demo123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Resend test recipient: delivered@resend.dev.
seed_data_creation: Created a few disposable products via inline product creation (name TESTPROD_<epoch>). These stay in demo catalog but are visibly marked NEW-XXXX and can be cleaned up by main agent. Also created and deleted a few test orders during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration 9 features are all working. Backend suite: /app/backend/tests/test_iter9_automations_email.py (run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest -o addopts='' backend/tests/test_iter9_automations_email.py -v`). Route trap noticed: /app/new (NOT /app/orders/new) is the NewOrder page; /app/orders/:id is OrderReview. Email flow: only delivered@resend.dev works (Resend TEST mode) — treat 403 on other recipients as expected. After every test that flips automations, automations reset to defaults confirmed via `GET /api/automations`.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found for iteration 9 features. One hydration warning in AutomationSetup <option> children (visual editor injects <span>); non-blocking, listed under design_issues.
